title: Detective

rationales.taskAutomation: Records searches, digital forensics triage, and report writing are automatable, but interviewing witnesses, judgment calls on leads, and courtroom testimony are not.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI-assisted case-linkage and digital-forensics tools are improving fast but are not yet a standard part of most department toolchains.
rationales.adoption: Larger metro and federal agencies use analytics tools; most local detective units still rely on manual database searches.
rationales.agenticExposure: Cross-referencing records, evidence logs, and cold-case databases is a research-summarize loop an agent can meaningfully assist, though final investigative judgment stays human.

tasksAtRisk: Digital forensics triage on seized devices
tasksGrowing: Judgment calls on which leads to pursue
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 33-3021, p25-p75 rounded

defenseSkills.skill: AI-assisted digital forensics and case-linkage tools
Advanced interview and interrogation technique certification

insight: Records work is automating fast, but the interview room and the witness stand still require a human.
